title: Connectome Influence Calculator
description: PETSc/SLEPc-backed Python library that computes influence scores of a neuron or group of neurons (seed) on all downstream neurons in a connectome, using a linear dynamical model of neural signal propagation. The algorithm is introduced and applied to the whole-CNS Drosophila BANC connectome in Bates, Phelps, Kim, Yang et al. (2026, Nature, open access; doi: 10.1038/s41586-026-10735-w; preprint v3: https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.07.31.667571v3).
